fields.text: Please check to indicate that you have no conflict of interest in marking this report.
Please check to indicate that your final assigned grade accounts for any reasonable adjustments indicated. These may appear on the report as an attached electronic sticker.

validation.message: Thanks for letting us know that you have a conflict of interest. You will not be able submit this form. Please contact the convenor so that a new examiner can be appointed.
Please review the University documentation on marking submissions with reasonable adjustments. If you have questions or concerns, please contact the convenor.
